text.title: Meta Audience Targeting (Granular) Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion MOFU granular targeting: 2-theme interest stack (SaaS OR DevOps); 2 iOS-safe filters; Advantage+ disabled (niche); exclusions per stage; dynamic creative off.
example.note: OR-stacked, iOS-safe filters, Advantage+ gated off, full exclusion matrix.
